commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 02 Jul

NYSE maintains clear liquidity leadership with the lowest ILLIQ (0.0013) and tightest AR spread (0.4495%), reflecting deep institutional participation. Nasdaq 100 ranks second but shows materially higher price impact (0.0024 ILLIQ) and wider spreads. London Stock Exchange significantly lags at rank five, with ILLIQ nearly 90x higher than NYSE, suggesting considerably thinner order books. European venues occupy middle rankings, with Euronext offering competitive roll spreads despite elevated price impact metrics.
